calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Trust Ownership Of Property And Authorizing Conveyance; Supporting Me
Off Calendar Dec-04-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Debra Kasper for Daria Crittenden (Petitioner).

Ms. Kasper stated that venue is proper in San Francisco based on where the Trustee conducts her activity, that all of the assets are located here, that the Trustee dealt with all of it here and that she has come up here to deal with the house and the bank accounts. Ms. Kasper also stated that what's left are the Wells Fargo accounts which are in San Francisco, that they don't have any adverse parties, that they won't have a trial, referred to the Code of Civil Procedure and stated that the Court has discretion to keep the matter here and decide it. The Court noted that the Trustee lives in Southern California and that the Sister also lives in Southern California. The Court asked Counsel to prepare an order for transfer to Los Angeles County.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

Petition For Order Determining Trust Ownership Of Property And Authorizing Conveyance; Supporting Me
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Dec-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
